import_boundary_rules.name: simulation_stays_adapter_free
import_boundary_rules.description: Simulation orchestration must not depend on UI or persistence adapters.

import_boundary_rules.name: persistence_stays_ui_free
import_boundary_rules.description: Persistence and migration code must not import UI rendering/input code.

import_boundary_rules.name: core_ui_stays_adapter_light
import_boundary_rules.description: Core UI helpers, renderers, presenters, and view models must not own simulation or persistence.

import_boundary_rules.name: reports_stays_ui_free
import_boundary_rules.description: Report generation is domain/application output data, not a UI renderer.

import_boundary_rules.name: world_change_is_headless_domain
import_boundary_rules.description: World-change code must remain deterministic and free of renderer/storage adapters.

import_boundary_rules.name: observation_is_headless_projection
import_boundary_rules.description: Observation projections must not import renderers, persistence, or mutating runtime adapters.

import_boundary_rules.name: world_change_reducers_are_deterministic
import_boundary_rules.description: Reducers and specifications must receive time/randomness as inputs.

import_boundary_rules.name: legacy_world_data_imports_are_scoped
import_boundary_rules.description: Legacy content projections stay in compatibility modules while new code uses setting bundles.

call_boundary_rules.name: headless_domain_has_no_direct_io
call_boundary_rules.description: Headless domain/projection code returns data instead of printing, prompting, or opening files.

acyclic_package_rules.name: world_change_package_is_acyclic
acyclic_package_rules.description: World-change domain modules should not form import cycles.

acyclic_package_rules.name: observation_package_is_acyclic
acyclic_package_rules.description: Observation projection modules should not form import cycles.

overrides.reason: Legacy aggregate kept for save/load and public constructor compatibility.
Narrative branch legacy resolver; split once relationship events move to a policy object.
Dense linguistic feature table builder; candidate for data-table extraction.
Canonical event contract still owns validation, serialization, and legacy adapter projection.
Legacy journey resolver combines event selection and narrative consequences.
Lifecycle resolver keeps death-staging compatibility until policy extraction.
Compatibility report composer with several public sections; keep stable while projections migrate.
Historical save migration handles several legacy payload shapes in one migration step.
Adventure advancement remains an orchestration adapter around multiple domain outcomes.
Pause-context adapter centralizes existing auto-stop reasons for UI compatibility.
Legacy mixin owns multiple pause reason adapters until notification policy is split further.
Notification policy currently centralizes several stop conditions for compatibility.
Geometry clustering algorithm with nested spatial checks; preserve behavior before extraction.
Atlas route drawing mixes visibility, blocking, and shape selection until route view models split.
Atlas label placement has collision and fallback branches that need visual regression coverage.
Legacy atlas mask clustering; candidate for shared geometry helper extraction.
Legacy mask generation composes several terrain fallbacks for save/display compatibility.
Terrain painting loop mixes adjacency and terrain-kind fallbacks; keep budget fixed until split.
CLI detail renderer composes several optional panels; should move to view models over time.
Route overlay builder has shape and visibility branches; split after map snapshot coverage.
Map information view model composes legacy terrain, route, and observation details.
World overview renderer still mixes layout and section fallback logic.
Interactive result screen dispatch remains a compatibility menu path.
View-model bridge preserves current monthly report card shape.
World memory facade is a broad compatibility surface during world module split.
Setting bundle schema dataclass exposes authored world sections as public fields.
Language evolution planner keeps several rule helpers together for deterministic naming.
Language name generator owns multiple deterministic generation strategies.
Timeline mixin remains a compatibility adapter for month/year advancement behavior.
Render backend protocol intentionally lists the CLI rendering surface.
Print backend mirrors the render protocol for no-Rich environments.
Rich backend mirrors the render protocol while adapting optional Rich features.
World actor facade remains a compatibility surface during world module split.
World calendar facade exposes current calendar transition API.
Backward-load hydration handles multiple historical schema shapes.
Serializer preserves current save payload shape while world state remains split across facades.
Propagation applies several authored effects in one compatibility entrypoint.
World remains the public compatibility aggregate while runtime APIs are split into mixins.
World composition root imports split mixins and facades for the public aggregate.
World structure facade is still a broad compatibility surface.
